series_metadata.series_description: Powerpoint presentations, videotapes, handouts, and other materials generated by the Board for presentations by Board members or Board staff on Board operations and/or procedures.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until the information is no longer currrent, and until no longer of administrative value. ; Electronic: Retain until the information is not longer current, and until no longer of administrative value., Paper: Trash ; Electronic: Erase
